sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37907" key="e)paitosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπαιτοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n37907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπαίτησις</ref></xr>, Charis.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,BGU:p.554K" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.554K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
